title: Daily Brief — June 10, 2026
content:

## 📈 Markets & Portfolio

### 🟠 MSTR (Strategy Inc.) — $117.53

- 📉 Stock slid from $187 (May 14) → $117 today, a ~37% drop tracking Bitcoin's crash below $60K *(Cryptonomist, Yahoo Finance)*
- 🛒 Strategy recently purchased 1,550 BTC for $101M; also repurchased $1.5B in convertible notes and issued $2B in preferred stock to buy ~24,869 more BTC *(Yahoo Finance)*
- 💹 Canaccord cut PT: $224 → **$163** (Buy); Mizuho cut PT: $320 → **$265** (Outperform) *(MarketBeat)*
- 📊 Analyst consensus: **Strong Buy** (12 of 12), avg 12-month target **$322.50** (range: $185–$705) — ~174% upside from today *(MarketBeat, WallStreetZen)*
- ⚠️ 52-week range: $104.17 – $457.22 | $8.2B debt with negative net income — high-risk, leveraged Bitcoin bet *(Simply Wall St)*

## ₿ Bitcoin — ~$61,170 (▼ 4.3% today)

### 😱 Fear & Greed Index — Weekly Trend
```
1 week ago  │ 52 (Neutral)      ████████████░░░░░░░░ 
3 days ago  │ 26 (Extreme Fear) █████░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░
Today       │  8 (Extreme Fear) ██░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░  🔴
```

- 📉 BTC crashed below $64K on June 4, briefly touching $61,500 — triggering **$2B+ in liquidations** *(Crypto Briefing)*
- 🏦 Record **$1.72B weekly ETF outflows** from BlackRock IBIT, Fidelity FBTC & Grayscale GBTC — institutional distribution in full swing *(Bitcoin Foundation)*
- 🔍 Retail "bear market" Google searches hit **5-year highs** — surpassing even the 2021 and 2022 crash peaks *(CoinDCX)*
- 📅 Cycle bottom outlook: CryptoQuant, Glassnode & Benjamin Cowen all converge on **Q4 2026 (Sep–Nov)** as the most probable bear market bottom *(Mudrex, BeInCrypto)*
- 💵 Macro trigger: Strong US jobs data pushed back Fed rate-cut expectations; USD strength is pressuring risk assets *(Yahoo Finance)*

---

## 🇺🇦 Ukraine War

- ⚔️ Russia net-lost 93 sq miles of Ukrainian territory May 5–June 3 per one tracker, but pro-Russian OSINT shows a small net gain — frontlines remain highly contested *(Russia Matters)*
- 🕊️ Zelenskyy proposed a face-to-face meeting with Putin and a "full ceasefire" on June 8 — Putin flatly rejected the offer *(Al Jazeera)*
- 🇬🇧🇫🇷🇩🇪 UK, France & Germany backed Zelenskyy's direct-talks call at a London summit on June 8 *(Al Jazeera)*
- 💣 Russian drone & shelling attack on Zaporizhia on June 9: **5 killed, 14 injured**, infrastructure and residential buildings damaged *(Al Jazeera)*
- 📊 1-year net: Russia gained ~1,427 sq miles (~0.6% of Ukraine) from June 2025 to June 2026 | Estimated casualties: 1M Russian / 250–300K Ukrainian *(Russia Matters)*

---

## 🇮🇷 Iran War — Day ~102

- 🚀 Iran fired **~30 ballistic missiles** at Israel on June 7–8 — first direct strike since the April ceasefire — killing civilians in Beit Shemesh, Haifa & Ramat Gan *(CNN)*
- ✈️ IDF struck Iranian targets in **Tehran, Isfahan, Tabriz & Mahshahr** (air defense systems + missile production facilities) *(CNN)*
- 🛑 Both sides have informally "paused" — Netanyahu halted strikes; Iran suspended attacks but warned it will resume if Lebanon strikes continue *(CNN, Al Jazeera)*
- 🕊️ Iran's top negotiator says Tehran is open to peace talks if the US is "honest and sincere" *(CNN)*
- 🌍 War context: Conflict started Feb 28, 2026 (US-Israel coalition vs. Iran) | Thousands dead in Iran & Lebanon, dozens in Israel, **millions displaced** *(Wikipedia, Britannica)*

---

*📡 Generated: June 10, 2026 | Sources: Yahoo Finance · MarketBeat · CNBC · Al Jazeera · CNN · Crypto Briefing · Bitcoin Foundation · Russia Matters · CoinDCX · BeInCrypto*
